title: Disable /seed for clients
description: The ability to toggle the availability of the /Seed command for clients
body:
This is a server-side mod that allows operator players to toggle the ability for other players to use the /seed command. This updates in real time and does not need a world reload to go into effect.

**/clientseed (true/false/get)**

This is the syntax ^


This can be used by any player with permission 2 or greater and has 3 possible inputs.
- True/False - enables or disables players using and seeing the /seed command.
- Get - returns the boolean value of the availability of the /seed command.

If this is a popular project and there is demand for it to be ported to other versions, I will.

Supported Version
- 1.21.11
- 1.21.10
- 1.21.9
- 1.21.8
- 1.21.7
